subcodes.first_line: It is humbly submitted to the presence of Áqá Dá'í Khán, that thou mayest ever partake of the heavenly Kawthar of Divine love from the hand of the spiritual Cup-bearer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض میشود خدمت آقا دائی خان انشاءالله همیشه کوثر محبت الهی را از ید ساقی روحانی
